energized_rp.description: Amount of FUEL scored in HUB at or above threshold

supercharged_rp.description: Amount of FUEL scored in HUB at or above threshold

traversal_rp.description: Amount of TOWER points scored during MATCH at or above threshold

robot_constraints.note: Weight excludes bumpers, battery, and location detection tags

hub_mechanics.description: Both HUBs active during AUTO, TRANSITION SHIFT, and END GAME. During ALLIANCE SHIFTS, HUBs alternate active/inactive based on AUTO results.

analysis_hints.endgame_activity: Tower climbing attempts typically occur in the final 30 seconds (END GAME). Level 1 available in AUTO (max 2 robots).
analysis_hints.hub_strategy: Track hub active/inactive status from FMS data. Scoring in inactive hub earns 0 points. Alliance shifts alternate every 25 seconds.
analysis_hints.fuel_context: Each FUEL scored in active HUB = 1 point (auto and teleop). High volume scoring is key: 100 FUEL for ENERGIZED RP, 360 for SUPERCHARGED RP.
analysis_hints.cycle_time: Fuel cycle = intake from field/depot -> score in hub. Track time between successive hub scores.
analysis_hints.tower_context: TRAVERSAL RP requires 50+ tower points. Level 3 climb (30 pts) + Level 2 (20 pts) = 50 pts minimum for RP.
analysis_hints.auto_importance: AUTO winner determines hub shift order. Scoring more FUEL in AUTO gives strategic advantage for SHIFT 1.
